title: CompositionLayerUpdate
description: Sparse update for a composition layer. Only id is required; omitted fields are unchanged. An empty modifiers array clears all modifiers. An empty children array clears all children.

id.description: The id of the layer to update.

x.description: Updated X position in absolute coordinates. Uses the same coordinate space as mobile wireframes.

y.description: Updated Y position in absolute coordinates. Uses the same coordinate space as mobile wireframes.

width.description: Updated width in pixels. Uses the same coordinate space as mobile wireframes.

height.description: Updated height in pixels. Uses the same coordinate space as mobile wireframes.

children.description: When present, replaces the full child list for this layer.

modifiers.description: When present, replaces the full modifier list for this layer. An empty array clears all modifiers.

compositeOperation.description: Updated composite operation for this layer.
